front: Film: iconic shot in which a nurse's face and a mute actress's face are superimposed/merged into one composite image
Film: stars Bibi Andersson as nurse Alma and Liv Ullmann as mute actress Elisabet Vogler
Film: opens with a rapid montage of a sheep being butchered, a nail hammered into a hand, and a morgue boy waking up to touch a projected image of a woman
Film: UK and US versions censored an erect penis from the opening montage
Film: Alma delivers an explicit monologue about a sexual encounter at the beach
Film: Elisabet briefly speaks after Alma threatens her with boiling water; near the end, Elisabet says 'nothing' (ingenting) when commanded to by Alma
Film: Camille Paglia's 1990 book Sexual Personae takes its cover image and title from this film
Film: David Lynch paid tribute to its doubling theme in Mulholland Drive
Film: Susan Sontag described how its form 'resists being reduced to a story'
